#Title: Self-Consistent Models of the Agn and Black Hole Populations: Duty 
#       Cycles, Accretion Rates, and the Mean Radiative Efficiency  
#Authors: Shankar F., Weinberg D.H., Miralda-Escude J. 
#Table: Black Hole Duty Cycles
#================================================================================
#Byte-by-byte Description of file: apj290759t4_mrt.txt
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#   Bytes Format Units     Label   Explanations
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#   1-  8 F8.6   ---       z       Redshift
#  10- 17 F8.6   [solMass] logM    Log of black hole mass
#  19- 26 F8.6   ---       P0      Duty cycle for reference model
#  28- 35 F8.6   ---       P0noCT  Duty cycle for reference model with no
#                                   Compton-thick sources (1)
#  37- 44 F8.6   ---       P0DCT   Duty cycle for reference model with double
#                                   Compton-thick sources (2)
#  46- 53 F8.6   ---       P0HRH07 Duty cycle for reference model with HRH07
#                                   luminosity function (3)
#  55- 62 F8.6   ---       P0Ext   Duty cycle for reference model with modified
#                                   HRH07 luminosity function (4)
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#Note (1): (i.e., with logNH/cm^−2^ > 24).
#Note (2): (i.e., with logNH/cm^−2^ {<=} 26).
#Note (3): where HRH07 is Hopkins, Richards & Hernquist (2007).
#Note (4): Obtained adopting the Hopkins, Richards & Hernquist (2007) luminosity
#          function with {epsilon} = 0.09 and mdot = 1.
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
